annotations.comment: Date and time picker cards seem to have a random tint colour
Tapping here doesnt bring up the keyboard to edit the ticket number
Buttons should fill the area horizontally like the delete query dialog

Delete query background is random, it should be a transparent dark background with blur.

See the cancel button, it has transparency on its background colour but the dialogue boxes background isnt transparent
I dont like the buttons and cards being the same colour as the background
